name: dev_catalog_good
note: A deliberate developer tool catalog. Each intent maps to one tool, each tool has a single effect level, and every write or destructive tool is gated. Running tests and reading source are read-only, editing source and opening a PR are gated writes, and deploying is a gated destructive action.

tools.name: run_tests
tools.description: Run the test suite. Read only.

tools.name: read_source
tools.description: Read a source file. Read only.

tools.name: edit_source
tools.description: Edit a source file. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: create_doc
tools.description: Create a new documentation file. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: open_pr
tools.description: Open a pull request. Requires confirmation.

tools.name: deploy
tools.description: Deploy to production. Requires authorization and confirmation.
